mnemonics.title: L-I-N-E-A-R Search Steps
mnemonics.content: Look through each element, Inspect if it matches, Not found? move Next, Eventually find or Return -1

mnemonics.title: Complexity Remember
mnemonics.content: Best Case: First (O1), Worst Case: Last (On), Average Case: Middle (On)

mnemonics.title: When to Use Linear
mnemonics.content: Unsorted Data, Small Size, Simple Implementation, Linked Structures
